EXPERIENCE & RELIEVING LETTER
TO WHOMSOEVER IT MAY CONCERN

This is to certify that Mr./Ms. Asha Kumar (Employee ID: 21) was employed with VJC Immigration & Visa Consultants Pvt. Ltd. as Visa Consultant in the Operations department at our Bangalore branch from 15 January 2024 to 01 July 2026.

During the tenure, the employee performed the assigned responsibilities with dedication and professionalism.

This is to confirm that the employee has been relieved from all duties and responsibilities with effect from 02 July 2026 after successfully completing the required handover process and exit formalities in accordance with the company's policies.

We thank the employee for their services and wish them every success in their future endeavors.

Yours sincerely,
